channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Shopee introduces AI tools to help MSMEs streamline customer service and product management
item.description: The article highlights how Shopee’s artificial intelligence tools are helping micro, small, and medium enterprises (MSMEs) in the Philippines manage the growing demands of online selling. It focuses o...

item.title: Ancient road-clearing tradition strengthens unity between Obecha and Okpai Obeze in Delta State
item.description: For many generations, a four-kilometre earth road linking Obecha and Okpai Obeze communities in Ndokwa East Local Government Area of Delta State has served as more than just a physical path; it has be...

item.title: SANDF and SAPS operations in Lavender Hill draw mixed reactions amid ongoing gang violence
item.description: On Friday, members of the South African National Defence Force (SANDF) together with the South African Police Service (SAPS) conducted operations in Lavender Hill and Steenberg on the Cape Flats, targ...

item.title: Resilience as integration: why overcoming adversity means incorporating it into your life story
item.description: The article challenges the widespread cultural belief that resilience means “bouncing back” to a previous state after adversity. Instead, it argues that true resilience is a dynamic process of integra...

item.title: Suspect in Riat Student Murder Admits to Enlistment of Accomplices
item.description: A suspect has confessed to orchestrating the murder of a Riat University student, admitting to recruiting two accomplices to inflict punishment. Authorities are investigating the case, with the suspec...

item.title: Minnesota coffee shop’s raspberry danish latte goes viral after recipe is shared globally
item.description: A small coffee shop in Northfield, Minnesota, called Little Joy Coffee has unexpectedly gone global after one of its seasonal creations, the raspberry danish latte, became a viral sensation. Originall...

item.title: UN chief says Islamabad US-Iran talks mark progress despite lack of agreement
item.description: UN Secretary General António Guterres has described the recent US-Iran talks hosted in Islamabad as a “positive and meaningful step” towards restarting diplomatic engagement, even though no formal agr...

item.title: Oil Prices Rise and U.S. Futures Fall Amid Concerns Over Strait of Hormuz Blockade

item.title: Michael Poa appears at second impeachment hearing involving Vice President Sara Duterte
item.description: Michael Poa attended the second proper impeachment hearing involving Vice President Sara Duterte, as reported by ABS-CBN News. The hearing forms part of ongoing proceedings that are drawing national a...

item.title: Rising fuel prices drive record public transport use in Canberra as new fare cap reduces commuting costs
item.description: Public transport usage in Canberra has surged in recent weeks as rising fuel prices place pressure on household budgets, prompting thousands of commuters to switch from private vehicles to buses and l...

item.title: Pope Leo XIV responds to Trump criticism over Iran remarks, emphasising moral authority over political engagement
item.description: Pope Leo XIV has sparked international debate after strongly condemning threats to “destroy Iranian civilisation” as “truly unacceptable” during escalating tensions in early 2026. His remarks prompted...

item.title: Tensions escalate as US blockade deadline passes on Iranian shipping while Middle East diplomacy and energy concerns intensify
item.description: A US-imposed deadline for the start of a military blockade targeting vessels entering and leaving Iranian ports has expired, sharply escalating tensions between the United States and Iran. The measure...

item.title: Comparison of Minimum Wages Across African Countries Shows Nigeria Ranking Low Despite Economic Size
item.description: Nigeria, wey be the largest economy for Africa, still dey lag behind many smaller African countries when it comes to minimum wage. According to the report, Nigeria current minimum wage of ₦70,000 per ...

item.title: Australia Appoints First Female Chief of Army
item.description: Australia don finally do wetin everybody been dey wait for – dem don appoint a woman, Lieutenant General Susan Coyle, as the first female Chief of Army. This na big deal because na after 125 years of ...

item.title: Three Indian writers shortlisted in Asia region for 2026 Commonwealth Short Story Prize
item.description: The 2026 Commonwealth Short Story Prize has announced its shortlist, featuring 25 writers from 14 countries across the Commonwealth. Among the selected writers in the Asia regional shortlist, three au...

item.title: El-Kanemi Warriors, Nasarawa United meet in crucial NPFL fixture with relegation and continental hopes on the line

item.title: UP research suggests regulatory changes could ease impact of foot-and-mouth disease on South Africa’s cattle industry

item.title: Nurses' strike at Kenyatta National Hospital disrupts services over salary and pension disputes
item.description: Nurses at Kenyatta National Hospital (KNH), Kenya’s biggest referral hospital, have gone on strike following long-standing disputes over employment conditions. The health workers are mainly protesting...

item.title: Pope Leo reaffirms peace stance after criticism from President Trump
item.description: Pope Leo has stated that he will continue speaking out against war despite a direct criticism from United States President Donald Trump. Speaking to journalists aboard the papal flight to Algiers, whe...
